REQUEST FOR JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF DANNY J. BAKER AND AGAINST DEFENDANT WESTERN MACARTHUR CO. IN THE SUM OF $315,600.00 PLUS COSTS AND INTEREST AS PROVIDED BY LAW, IN AN AMOUNT TO BE DETERMINED LATER BY THE COURT. THE COURT SUA SPONTE TOOK MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE CHIANTELLI; CLERK: V. MU; MATTER WAS NOT REPORTED (503)
